stories.title: 'It's up to the Lakers': What LeBron needs to return to L.A. -- and why it's not so simple
stories.summary: When James led the Lakers to the second round, it underscored an awkward reality for both sides: They might need each other more than either would care to admit.

stories.title: Steelers-Saints in Paris part of record int'l slat...
stories.summary: The NFL on Wednesday revealed the matchups of international slate, which features nine games, the most outside the United States in the league's history.

stories.title: Leafs fire head coach Berube after 2 seasons
stories.summary: The Toronto Maple Leafs have fired head coach Craig Berube, the team announced Wednesday.

stories.title: Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke dies at age 29
stories.summary: Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke has died at age 29.

stories.title: Collins, NBA's first openly gay player, dies at 47...
stories.summary: Jason Collins, the NBA's first openly gay player who has served as a global ambassador for the sport for the past decade, has died of brain cancer, his family said Tuesday. He was 47.
